div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 173px; height: 1px; padding-top: 74px; margin-left: 12px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Install Dependencies
isolated .eval-venv
re-run ensure_deps.py
uv / venv pip fallback
mlflow[genai], anthropic[vertex]

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 122px; margin-left: 530px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Run Preflight Checks
check_env.py --fix
venv / deps / dirs
all checks pass?

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 64px; margin-left: 792px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Create MLflow Experiment
read eval.yaml mlflow
setup_experiment()
resolve_tracking_uri()
skip if no eval.yaml

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 74px; margin-left: 1082px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Final Verification
re-run check_env.py
validate eval.yaml
confirm all set up

Report + Next Steps
what passed / failed
analyze -> dataset
run -> review

Configure MLflow Tracking
skip if --skip-mlflow
local server :5000
sqlite file store
remote (Databricks)

Configure Runs Dir + Env
AGENT_EVAL_RUNS_DIR

check eval.yaml $VAR refs
warn if any unset

MLflow Server
external tracking
experiment registry
traces + metrics

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 225px; height: 1px; padding-top: 304px; margin-left: 246px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
VENV=.eval-venv/bin/python3
test -x $VENV
-> venv: OK
$VENV -c 'import yaml'
-> pyyaml: OK

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 260px; height: 1px; padding-top: 474px; margin-left: 361px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
# local server (recommended)
mlflow server --port 5000
export MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI=
http://127.0.0.1:5000
# local file store
export MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI=
sqlite:///mlflow.db

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 235px; height: 1px; padding-top: 474px; margin-left: 71px;

div.div:
URI resolution order:
1. mlflow.tracking_uri
(eval.yaml)
2. MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI
(env var)
3. http://127.0.0.1:5000
